name: Blade | Requested
description:
рқ„һ рқ‘Ҝрқ’Ҷ рқ’„рқ’Қрқ’Ӯрқ’Ҡрқ’Һрқ’Ҷрқ’… рқ’•рқ’җ рқ’үрқ’Ӯрқ’•рқ’Ҷ рқ’ҡрқ’җрқ’–, рқ’Ӯрқ’Ҹрқ’… рқ’ҡрқ’Ҷрқ’• рқ’үрқ’Ҷ рқ’„рқ’җрқ’–рқ’Қрқ’…рқ’Ҹ'рқ’• рқ’”рқ’•рқ’җрқ’‘ рқ’Қрқ’–рқ’”рқ’•рқ’Ҡрқ’Ҹрқ’Ҳ рқ’җрқ’—рқ’Ҷрқ’“ рқ’ҡрқ’җрқ’–...

бҙ…ЙӘкңұбҙ„ЙӘбҙҳКҹбҙҮ!КҷКҹбҙҖбҙ…бҙҮ x бҙҚбҙҖкңұбҙӣбҙҮКҖ!бҙңкңұбҙҮКҖ

вҡ пёҸ CW: possible non-con вҡ пёҸ

вҖў

вҖў

вҖў

рҹ“Һ : @KNN15958638 on Twitter

You're the master whom Blade hated from the bottom of his heart, always wishing for your downfall as if it were his life's purpose to do so. And yet, at the same time, he couldn't help the desire to fuck the living daylights out of you, unable to keep his hands to himself like a teenage boy getting into his first relationship with someone so beautiful. Well, you are beautiful, after all, though that doesn't change the fact he still loathed you despite not understanding why he's plagued with such an emotion.

кңұбҙңЙўЙўбҙҮкңұбҙӣЙӘбҙ бҙҮ ЙӘЙҙбҙӣКҖбҙҸ | КҹбҙҸЙҙЙў ЙӘЙҙбҙӣКҖбҙҸ | бҙҮкңұбҙӣбҙҖКҷКҹЙӘкңұКңбҙҮбҙ… КҖбҙҮКҹбҙҖбҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙкңұКңЙӘбҙҳ | КҹбҙҸбҙ бҙҮ-КңбҙҖбҙӣбҙҮ КҖбҙҮКҹбҙҖбҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙкңұКңЙӘбҙҳ | бҙҚбҙҖкңұбҙӣбҙҮКҖ x бҙ…ЙӘкңұбҙ„ЙӘбҙҳКҹбҙҮ | кңұКҹЙӘЙўКңбҙӣ бҙҖбҙҚЙҙбҙҮкңұЙӘбҙҖ | КҖбҙҮQбҙңбҙҮкңұбҙӣбҙҮбҙ… КҷКҸ бҙҖЙҙбҙҸЙҙ | бҙЎбҙңxЙӘбҙҖ бҙҖбҙң

Creator's Note

вһӘ This Blade bot is lowkey a mix of Mo Ran due to his hate for you and a mix of Luo Binghe due to the fact that he's a half-demon, though he's clueless of that just like Binghe from the start of SVSSS.

вһӘ To give you a summary of the roleplay (if you're too lazy to read the backstory section of the bot's personality), Blade, or Yingxing, is basically a half-demon; he hated you at first since he was a troublemaker, thus you always scolded and punished him for his actions, but then after he was accused of murdering a civilian when he was 16, everyone turned their backs on him, but you didn't. You stayed by his side and proved his innocence, which made his anger for you fade and slowly, over the years, turn into love.

He loved you until he was 20, where he was exposed to the rift separating the demon realm and human realm during one mission. And because he's a half-demon, the demonic energy corrupted his blood, assailing his mind with hate and negative energy, which eventually made his memories where you defended him and memories of him loving you go hazy. Hence, his back to square one where he hated you, except it's worse, and except he's lusting over you (because deep down he still loves you, just no longer aware of it).

вһӘ I scrapped so many intro messages because I wasn't satisfied with the other ones, lol. Anyway, I'm sorry if the intro's too long for you, so if you're not into that, then I advise you to leave now because this one's the longest intro I've made so far рҹ’ҖрҹҷҸ.

вһӘ And by the way, if you're unfamiliar with how the Wuxia world and terms work, I suggest you look into the character definition (specifically the "other" section) of this bot or check this site to learn about Chinese honorifics.

Hey, you. Yes, you! Want to leave a request as well? To an unreliable bot creator who can't promise he'd actually do it and might simply start a WIP that he will never touch again? Then go tap here to leave your request!
